name: Detection of Malicious File or Process
notes:
This rule triggers when a Filename or Process Name considered as being part of Malware execution is observed. This rule is monitoring for the following file or process names:
-Minergate
-Neshta
-Slayer Leecher
-NLBrute (NL)
-EternalBlue
-MimiKatz / MimiPenguin
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, System.File Created

when the event matches LOWER("Filename") MATCHES '((minergate|neshta|slayer.*?leecher|nlbrute|eternalblue|mimi(katz|penguin)).*|nl\.exe)' or LOWER("Process Name") MATCHES '((minergate|neshta|slayer.*?leecher|nlbrute|eternalblue|mimi(katz|penguin)).*|nl\.exe)' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Detection of Malicious File or Process on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, System.File Created

AND when the event matches LOWER("Filename") MATCHES '((minergate|neshta|slayer.*?leecher|nlbrute|eternalblue|mimi(katz|penguin)).*|nl\.exe)' or LOWER("Process Name") MATCHES '((minergate|neshta|slayer.*?leecher|nlbrute|eternalblue|mimi(katz|penguin)).*|nl\.exe)' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Malicious Filename or Process Name Detected
Event description: Detects when a Filename or Process Name considered as being part of Malware execution is observed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
